titles.text: ミネルバトンサーガ ラゴンの復活

descriptions.text: ダークロード・テラリンの封印が破られ、テラリンが再び世界に解き放たれました。彼女はゴールデンシールを奪い、パンドラの箱を開けて悪のクリーチャーを世界に解き放ちました。若き英雄は王からテラリンを止めるよう命じられます。彼はかつてテラリンを誤って解き放ち、再びダークロードを封印するために戦った羊飼いイアソンの足跡を辿らなければなりません。英雄は、戦士ガイ、アマゾネスのメディ、海賊トレオ（マニュアルではトゥロと呼ばれています）の三人の仲間の助けを借り、テラリンの巣窟への三つの鍵を見つけなければなりません。ダークロードに立ち向かうために、彼らは古の神秘的な武器と鎧を見つけ、テラリンを打ち倒し、ダークロードを世界から封印しなければなりません。

The seal of the Dark Lord Terarin has been broken and Terarin has been unleashed into the world again. She has stolen the Golden Seal and opened pandora's box, unleashing evil creatures into the world. A young hero is tasked by a king to stop Terarin. He must step into footsteps of Iason, a shepherd that once accidentally unleashed Terarin and fought to seal the Dark Lord again. The hero must enlist the aid of three companions, Guy the warrior, Medi the amazon and Treo the pirate (called Turo in the manual) and find the three keys to Terarin's lair. To face the Dark Lord, they must find the mystical weapons and armor of old and then defeat Terarin and seal the Dark Lord from the world.

Miracle Warriors: Seal of the Dark Lord, known as Haja no Fūin (覇邪の封印; lit. Seal of the Dark Lord) in Japan, is a role-playing video game initially released by Kogado Software Products for the NEC PC-8801 in 1986. It was then ported to various other systems, including a Master System port developed by Sega, which was released internationally. In the game, Demon Queen Terarin has unleashed dark creatures upon the world, and it is up to a young hero, joined by three companions, to restore peace by defeating her and sealing her away once again.
